witnesses.description: A bijective continuous map between two renamed two-point Sierpinski spaces.

checks.claim: The renamed Sierpinski map is continuous because every codomain open set has an open preimage.
checks.notes: The validator checks every codomain open set and recomputes its preimage.

checks.claim: The preimage of the codomain open set {v} is the domain open set {1}.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the listed preimage and checks it is open in the domain.

checks.claim: The renamed Sierpinski map is a homeomorphism.
checks.notes: The validator checks bijectivity, continuity, and continuity of the inverse map.

checks.claim: The identity-shaped map from the Sierpinski topology to the discrete topology is continuous.
checks.notes: The validator rejects continuity because the preimage of {u} is {0}, which is not open in the Sierpinski domain; the separate qf-uf-bad-preimage-membership row checks the malformed preimage-membership consistency conflict.

checks.claim: A malformed preimage table excludes 0 even though f(0)=u and u is in the codomain open set {u}.

data.certificate: prove_qf_uf_unsat_alethe emits Evidence::UnsatAletheProof checked by Evidence::check with no trusted reduction step

checks.notes: The SMT-LIB artifact isolates only the function/preimage membership obligation. Finite topology replay still owns the separate claim that the computed preimage {0} is not domain-open.

checks.claim: The identity-shaped bijection from the Sierpinski topology to the discrete topology is a homeomorphism.
checks.notes: The validator rejects the homeomorphism claim because the forward map is not continuous.

checks.claim: General continuous-map theorems require future Lean resources.

data.target_theorem_shape: continuous images of compact spaces are compact, continuous images of connected spaces are connected, and homeomorphisms preserve topological invariants
data.future_checker: Lean module with no sorryAx dependencies

checks.notes: The finite rows are checked; arbitrary continuous-map theorems remain proof-assistant horizons.
